author: Rahim Mirani
name: Non-record: Variable-Rank LQER + Muon-TTT experiment
blurb: Experimental non-record submission testing Hessian-allocated variable-rank LQER plus Muon-style LoRA TTT and a longer phased-TTT prefix on a strong CaseOps/LQER/SparseGate baseline. Seed 42 baseline reproduction passed at 1.06005735 BPB, but the full stack regressed to 1.06203230 BPB and exceeded the 600s eval limit at 627.3s.
reason_not_leaderboard_eligible: The attempted stack was worse than the seed 42 reproduction and exceeded the 600s evaluation limit.

42_reproduction.config: baseline reproduction with LQER_VARIABLE_RANK=0, TTT_OPTIMIZER=adam, PHASED_TTT_PREFIX_DOCS=2500

technique_summary: Env-gated byte accounting audit, Hessian-trace variable-rank LQER allocation, Muon-style TTT optimizer, and PHASED_TTT_PREFIX_DOCS=3000. Negative seed-42 result: regressed BPB and over-budget eval time.
